inputs.label: Conversion Factor (GB per GiB)
inputs.businessContext: Factor for converting GiB to GB (fixed, but overridable for calibration).

businessContext_i18n.en: Factor for converting GiB to GB (fixed, but overridable for calibration).
businessContext_i18n.tr: GiB'yi GB'ye dönüştürme faktörü (sabittir, ancak kalibrasyon için değiştirilebilir).
businessContext_i18n.de: Faktor zur Umrechnung von GiB in GB (fest, aber zur Kalibrierung überschreibbar).

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal digits for output rounding.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal digits for output rounding.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı yuvarlaması için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgaberundung.

inputs.label: Safety Factor (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage added to result as safety margin, e.g., 10 means increase by 10%.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage added to result as safety margin, e.g., 10 means increase by 10%.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonuca güvenlik marjı olarak eklenen yüzde; örn. 10, %10 artış anlamına gelir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz, der als Sicherheitsmarge zum Ergebnis addiert wird, z. B. 10 bedeutet Erhöhung um 10%.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
